title: Bengal Tiger
subTitle: Akash, a simple man, falls in love with politician Gajapathi's daughter, Meera. However, on learning the identity of Akash's father, Gajapathi suspects that he wants revenge for a past transgression.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Vikram Vetal
subTitle: King Vikramaditya is told twenty-five stories by a ghost, Vetal. He must find a moral lesson in each of these stories.

title: Sher Ka Shikaar
subTitle: A man, who is famous in his village for killing man-eating tigers, unwillingly becomes a part of a conspiracy surrounding illegal drugs.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Spyder
subTitle: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
subTitle: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Spider Is Back
subTitle: Sima Cong is blackmailed by a wealthy Thai businessman to find the golden spider city at any cost. Sima, along with his girlfriend Lisa and her father, go to an island to find the golden city.

title: Lingaa
subTitle: Lingaa, a petty thief, turns over a new leaf after realising the role his grandfather has played in building a dam for the villagers. He then dedicates his life to saving it from a corrupt minister.

title: Ramayan
subTitle: King Dasharatha conducts a Yagya, hoping for a son. Simultaneously, Ravan challenges Lord Shiva and faces punishment for his arrogance.

title: Ramayan
subTitle: King Dasharatha conducts a Yagya, hoping for a son. Simultaneously, Ravan challenges Lord Shiva and faces punishment for his arrogance.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Aattral
subTitle: Arjun's father, who is a mechanic, manages to get INR 10 lakh to fulfil Arjun's dream of developing an automatic car. However, the former is robbed and killed by a mysterious man.

title: Vikramadithyan
subTitle: Two close friends face various hurdles as they navigate the complexities of life while striving to realise their shared dreams.

title: The Power of 3 Jai Luv Kush
subTitle: Separated at childhood, identical triplets, who find their calling in life, reunite after one of them kidnaps other two brothers for his own purpose.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Tumbbad
subTitle: Vinayak Rao, a resident of the village Tumbbad, repeatedly steals the ill-fated wealth of the evil Hastar, until his greed and heinous acts become the reason for his doom.

title: Navarathna
subTitle: Moksha, a photographer, finds an ancient necklace that brings ill fate to those who wear it. Under the guise of capturing rare birds, she goes into a forest and plans to dispose of the ornament.

title: Crime Scene
subTitle: A young woman is murdered close to Christmas in an upscale neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro, and the killer remains near even after detectives are called.
